response:
To compute the **sample standard deviation** of the data set:

$$
\{25, 10, 0, 9, -1, -14, -21\}
$$

---

### Step 1: Find the mean (average) of the data set

$$
\text{Mean} = \frac{25 + 10 + 0 + 9 + (-1) + (-14) + (-21)}{7}
$$

$$
= \frac{25 + 10 + 0 + 9 - 1 - 14 - 21}{7}
$$

$$
= \frac{25 + 10 + 9 - 1 - 14 - 21}{7}
$$

$$
= \frac{44 - 40}{7} = \frac{4}{7}
$$

---

### Step 2: Subtract the mean from each data point and square the result

$$
\begin{align*}
25 - \frac{4}{7} &= \frac{175 - 4}{7} = \frac{171}{7} \\
10 - \frac{4}{7} &= \frac{70 - 4}{7} = \frac{66}{7} \\
0 - \frac{4}{7} &= -\frac{4}{7} \\
9 - \frac{4}{7} &= \frac{63 - 4}{7} = \frac{59}{7} \\
-1 - \frac{4}{7} &= \frac{-7 - 4}{7} = -\frac{11}{7} \\
-14 - \frac{4}{7} &= \frac{-98 - 4}{7} = -\frac{102}{7} \\
-21 - \frac{4}{7} &= \frac{-147 - 4}{7} = -\frac{151}{7}
\end{align*}
$$

Now square each of these:

$$
\begin{align*}
\left(\frac{171}{7}\right)^2 &= \frac{29241}{49} \\
\left(\frac{66}{7}\right)^2 &= \frac{4356}{49}
